title: Scape and Run: Parasites Halloween
description: Adds Halloween content related to parasites
body:
**Addon for [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites) that adds Halloween-themed content.**
### Adds:
- 4 skins for the Rupter
- 1 skin for the Pri Bolster
- Entity Distributor – a massive living flesh entity of the Crude tier that combines combat abilities with the power to spawn reinforcements.


### Mechanics:

After the 6th day of survival, parasites with Halloween-themed skins — as well as a new parasite — can appear in the world. When they spawn, fire particles will appear at the spawn location.

### Future Plans:
- Halloween event
- Event boss
- New parasite skins
- New decorative and functional items



### Help/Support/Suggestions:
